notes: Feuds: temporary truces. A full 🤝 Broker peace can get pricey, so you can now buy a cheaper 🕊️ Truce instead — about a third of the cost — that sets two rival crews' feud aside for 6 cycles so they'll serve together meanwhile. The feud isn't gone: when the truce lapses it smoulders back (re-buy to extend), whereas full peace ends it for good. Both options appear on the Contacts card with live prices.
